description: Trades ABC trend continuation: an impulse leg (A), a counter-trend pullback (B), then enters on the resumption (C). Works long and short.

properties.description: ABC = trend continuation; ABCD = ABC with measured-move leg-D target; DoublePullback = ABAB'C double-pullback filter; NInRowBreakout = enter on brick N+1 after N consecutive same-direction bricks; NBrickReversal = enter on the flip after N same-direction bricks; PullbackContinuation = lean trend+small pullback resume; ExhaustionFade = fade an extended run on the first opposite brick; FailedReversalSpring = enter with trend after a one-brick fake reversal fails; RenkoSwingStructure = Dow-theory HH/HL swing structure from brick reversals, enter on break after N confirmed pairs
Minimum bars in the counter-trend pullback (B)
Maximum bars in the counter-trend pullback (B)
Bars of resumption (C) required before entering
Don't chase: only enter while C run is at or below this many bars
Require Leg B retracement of Leg A to fall within the min/max band
Leg B must retrace at least this % of Leg A
Leg B must retrace no more than this % of Leg A (stay below 100 to keep the ABC valid)
Minimum bars in the initial trend leg (A)
Projected leg-D target = leg-A size x this from entry (ABCD mode; uses ABC Pattern leg settings for entry)
Minimum bars in the first counter-trend pullback (B) (DoublePullback mode)
Maximum bars in the first counter-trend pullback (B) (DoublePullback mode)
Minimum bars in the brief trend re-continuation between B and B' (DoublePullback mode)
Maximum bars in the brief trend re-continuation between B and B' (DoublePullback mode)
Minimum bars in the second (shallower) pullback (B') (DoublePullback mode)
Maximum bars in the second (shallower) pullback (B') (DoublePullback mode)
Bars of final resumption (C) required before entering (DoublePullback mode)
Don't chase: only enter while C run is at or below this many bars (DoublePullback mode)
Require the second pullback (B') to hold above the first pullback low (long) / below the first pullback high (short) (DoublePullback mode)
Minimum bars in the initial trend leg (A) (DoublePullback mode)
Only take the flip while the exhausted run is at or below this many bricks/bars — skips over-extended runs (0 = no cap). (NBrickReversal mode)
The exhausted run must span at least this many ticks to count as real exhaustion (0 = off). (NBrickReversal mode)
Structural target = exhausted-run size x this, projected from entry (used when Use Structural Target is on). (NBrickReversal mode)
Consecutive same-direction bricks/bars required before the flip entry (NBrickReversal mode)
Skip the setup if the trend leg exceeds this many bricks/bars — avoids chasing exhausted trends (0 = no cap). (PullbackContinuation mode)
Minimum counter-trend bricks/bars in the pullback (PullbackContinuation mode)
Maximum counter-trend bricks/bars in the pullback (PullbackContinuation mode)
Bars of resumption (C) in the trend direction required before entering (PullbackContinuation mode)
Structural target = trend-leg (A) size x this, projected from entry (used when Use Structural Target is on). (PullbackContinuation mode)
Minimum trend bricks/bars before the pullback (PullbackContinuation mode)
Require price to close this many ticks beyond the swing level to confirm a break — filters marginal pokes (0 = exact break). (MarketStructureBreak mode)
Skip the break unless the swing range (pivot high to pivot low) is at least this many ticks — filters noise (0 = off). (MarketStructureBreak mode)
Measured-move target = swing range x this beyond the break level (used when Use Structural Target is on). (MarketStructureBreak mode)
Counter-move (in bricks/bars) needed to confirm a swing pivot (MarketStructureBreak mode). 1 = every reversal is a pivot.
Range only counts as a box if its high-to-low height is at or below this many ticks (ConsolidationBreakout mode)
Profit target = box height x this multiplier, a measured move (ConsolidationBreakout mode)
Range only counts as a box if its high-to-low height is at least this many ticks — skips ultra-tight noise (0 = off). (ConsolidationBreakout mode)
Require price to close this many ticks beyond the box edge to confirm the breakout (0 = exact break). (ConsolidationBreakout mode)
Number of bars defining the consolidation range (ConsolidationBreakout mode)
On = fire only on exactly Thrust Bricks (fresh ignition). Off = fire on Thrust Bricks or more consecutive bars. (ThreeBrickThrust mode)
The thrust run must span at least this many ticks to qualify — filters weak thrusts (0 = off). (ThreeBrickThrust mode)
Measured-move target = thrust size x this, projected from entry (used when Use Structural Target is on). (ThreeBrickThrust mode)
Consecutive same-direction bricks/bars (after an opposite bar) that define a momentum thrust (ThreeBrickThrust mode)
Two swing lows (or highs) count as 'equal' if within this many ticks (DoubleTopBottom mode)
Require price to close this many ticks beyond the neckline (middle pivot) to confirm the break (0 = exact break). (DoubleTopBottom mode)
Neckline-to-lows/highs height must be at least this many ticks — skips shallow, low-payoff patterns (0 = off). (DoubleTopBottom mode)
Measured-move target = pattern height x this beyond the neckline (used when Use Structural Target is on). (DoubleTopBottom mode)
Counter-move (in bricks/bars) needed to confirm a swing pivot (DoubleTopBottom mode). 1 = every reversal is a pivot.
Only fade while the exhausted run is at or below this many bricks/bars — skips over-extended runs (0 = no cap). (ExhaustionFade mode)
The exhausted run must span at least this many ticks to count as real exhaustion (0 = off). (ExhaustionFade mode)
Structural target = exhausted-run size x this, projected from entry (used when Use Structural Target is on). (ExhaustionFade mode)
Cap the structural stop to this many ticks from entry — keeps the fade stop tight (0 = use fade-brick extreme only). (ExhaustionFade mode)
Consecutive same-direction bricks/bars required before the fade entry (ExhaustionFade mode)
Skip the setup if the trend leg exceeds this many bricks/bars (0 = no cap). (FailedReversalSpring mode)
Maximum consecutive opposite bricks allowed for the failed reversal — 1 = single-brick spring only (FailedReversalSpring mode)
The trend leg must span at least this many ticks before the fake reversal (0 = off). (FailedReversalSpring mode)
Structural target = trend-leg size x this, projected from entry (used when Use Structural Target is on). (FailedReversalSpring mode)
Minimum same-direction bricks/bars in the trend leg before the fake reversal (FailedReversalSpring mode)
Consecutive higher-high + higher-low (or lower-low + lower-high) swing pairs required before a break entry — ABC generalized to N legs (RenkoSwingStructure mode)
Require price to close this many ticks beyond the prior swing level to confirm the break (0 = exact break). (RenkoSwingStructure mode)
Skip the break unless the latest swing range (pivot high to pivot low) is at least this many ticks (0 = off). (RenkoSwingStructure mode)
Measured-move target = swing range x this beyond the break level (used when Use Structural Target is on). (RenkoSwingStructure mode)
Counter-move (in bricks/bars) needed to confirm a swing pivot (RenkoSwingStructure mode). 1 = every reversal is a pivot.
Renko brick size in ticks — when set, the N+1 run must span at least (N+1) x this many ticks (0 = off, chart brick size only). (NInRowBreakout mode)
Consecutive same-direction bricks required for trend confirmation; entry fires on brick N+1 (NInRowBreakout mode)
Fallback stop distance when structural stop is off or invalid

Hard cap on how far the stop may sit from entry. A far-away structural stop gets rejected by the broker's price-band limits, leaving the position unprotected. If the structural stop exceeds this, it is clamped in tight. 0 = no cap (dangerous with structural stops).
Target the pattern's structural level (Leg A extreme, swing pivot, measured move, etc.) instead of fixed ticks
Take profit this many ticks before the structural target level
Place the stop just beyond the Leg B extreme instead of a fixed tick distance
Extra ticks beyond the Leg B extreme for the structural stop
Require price to move this many ticks in your favor before trailing begins (0 = immediate)
Enable daily maximum profit cap (currency)
Enable daily maximum loss cap (currency)
Close current trade and stop trading when realized + unrealized PnL breaches daily limits
Dynamically raise the daily loss floor as profit accumulates
When realized profit reaches this amount, raise the daily loss floor to Tier 1 Floor
Daily loss floor once Tier 1 is reached. Use 0 for breakeven, negative to allow a small drawback.
When realized profit reaches this amount, raise the daily loss floor to Tier 2 Floor
Daily loss floor once Tier 2 is reached.
When realized profit reaches this amount, raise the daily loss floor to Tier 3 Floor (0 = disabled)
Daily loss floor once Tier 3 is reached.
Halt trading after N consecutive losing trades in the same day
Number of losing trades per day before trading is halted
Limit the number of entries per calendar day
Maximum entries per calendar day
Move stop to breakeven when unrealized profit reaches this dollar amount (0 = off)
Longs only when price is above EMA; shorts only when price is below EMA

properties.displayName: Use Momentum Filter (set to false for NBrickReversal, ExhaustionFade, and DoubleTopBottom modes)
properties.description: Require price above/below EMA and closing in trade direction
Require close > open for longs, close < open for shorts
Minimum AI profit_probability (0-1) required to enter
AI Provider to use
OpenAI model to use
Anthropic model to use
Model name (required for Ollama; overrides enum selection for OpenAI/Anthropic)
Base URL for Ollama server (required if Provider is Ollama)
When enabled, reads API keys from environment variables (FLUXTRADE_OPENAI_API_KEY / FLUXTRADE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)
API key for OpenAI (env: FLUXTRADE_OPENAI_API_KEY when Use Environment API Keys is enabled)
API key for Anthropic (env: FLUXTRADE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY when Use Environment API Keys is enabled)
Maximum tokens for AI filter completion response
Cache AI filter results to avoid duplicate API calls
Wait this many seconds before making AI filter API call (for cascading multiple accounts)
Gate entries through FluxTrade_ChatGPT_Filter profit_probability score
